per_task.delta_note: baseline wrote a generic script in prose with no BOUND VOICE line and no ## SHOTS & EDIT or ## REPURPOSE headers; skill-loaded emitted BOUND VOICE plus all five ## sections and the [0-3s] timestamped template, no 'it depends'.
